name: Schwalbennester (Barvarian Veal)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Veal, Cut In 4 Thin Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry the veal slices on paper towels.
2. Roll each slice in a mixture of salt, sugar, white pepper, and mustard.
3. Place a bacon slice on top of each veal piece.
4. Place an unbroken egg on top of the bacon.
5. Roll up each slice of veal (jelly-roll fashion) and tie securely with string.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the veal rolls well on all sides.
7. Add onion to the pan; sauté for 3 minutes.
8. Add the hot beef bouillon; cover and simmer gently for 25 minutes.
9. Remove the veal from the pan, remove strings, and keep veal warm on a serving platter.
10. Add tomato paste to the pan drippings; stir.
11. Thoroughly mix flour and red wine to remove all lumps.
12. Add the mixture to the sauce and cook until it thickens.
13. Add the warm veal rolls and heat through.
14. Before serving, place the veal rolls on a platter, pour sauce over the rolls, and serve with mashed potatoes.
